interaction_phrase: led by the Samsung Catalyst Fund
occurrence_sentence: In the most recent example of big bets, IonQ, a leader in universal quantum computing, recently announced it has secured $55 million in a funding round led by the Samsung Catalyst Fund and Mubadala Capital, according to a company news release.
